titleStmt.title: SII 26.767: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 767. (A.R. No. 716 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Uḍaiyār śrī-Vijaya Rājēndradēva (Rājādhirāja I): Year 35, Friday, Svāti = 1053 A.D. September 17, when the tithi was śu. 3 of Bhādrapada month.

summary.p: This inscription is extremely damaged and is built in at the beginning. It contains the praśasti of the king of which the beginning Tiṅgaḷēr taru, etc. is not available.
It mentions the mahāsabhai of [Madurā]ntakach-charuppēdi[maṅgalam] in Rājēndiraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . From tiṅkaḷer to puṇar seems to be built in. ntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu tantaiya
r tampiyar taṉṟirumaintarrenṟivarai maṇi
muṭiccūṭṭi kaṉṉi kāvalar tennavar muvaruḷ vāṉa
kamiruvarukkaruḷi kāṉakam Oruvaṉukku Aḷittu po
rucilaicceralala is writ en below.ṉ velaikeḻu kāntaḷūrccālai
kalamaṟuppittilaṅkaiyaṟ karaicaiyu palaṅ
vallavaṉaiyuṅ kaṉṉakucciyar kāvala
ṉaiyum poṉṉaṇi muṭittalai taṭintu taṉ koṭippa
ṭaiyevik kaṉṉāṭakar viṭukaṭakari puraḷat taṉṉāṭaiyi
ṟṟamiṭparaṇi koṇṭoṉṉār vicciya neṭuvāḷ viccayaṉ
veruneḷittañciyoṭattaṉ vañciyam paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ pitā
vai mātāvoṭuñ cātar maliviṅku nirppūṇṭura veñcamatta
kappaṭuttayaṟpaṭai Āhomallan payattoṭum varaviṭu moṟ
ṟarai veruvappiṭippit tāṅkavar mārvilā Āhomallaṉu
yāṅkaṇu Añciṉanenṉu naṉkeḻutic celuttippiṉṉaitta
ṉ pulikkoṭippaṭai ñaroṭṭalar vāraṇavaraikacaikkaṭal purai ciṟu
tuṟai peruntuṟai teyva vīmātiyenṟuṟutuṟai munṟilumulār puna
lūṭṭi yāṅka vanettakkiriyiloṅkiya Uḻuvai yeṟeḻuti U
yar jayastampameḻil peṟa niṟuttit tankaḻal paṇintoḻukum
Araicarkaḷoṭuñ ceṇṭāṭiya perumpuli virakkoṭiyo
ṭu tiyākakkoṭiyoṭut tonnalaṟ kavarnta tonnetippiṟakka
valār noṟkiyntu vi viṭutaṇṭattu kkavan
vel viranuḷampaṉuṅ kāḷitāsanum viḷamparuntārc cāmu
ṇṭanum poṟkoḻi Iyyaṉum villavarājaṉu muta
linar veñcamat titu pokavar peruneti kavarntu kūccara
ṉum paḷankoycalaṟ pacuntalai tārttayilp pantaṭintu
munkoṇṭu ta vantappai muntaiyappa Appakai ceku
ttu Umpaḷan vaḻiyilaṟappil vallaraicarkaḷāṅkatu miṭakamāya
ppukuntāṇavaṟka kamāttutam mu
ṭuttut taṭamuṭikkiṭaṅkuṭuntirunta taṭaṅkaiy vanta
paṟittuṭankoṭu ponta taṟ pinvaṟattulainta
ñcā ya veñcamal karutiyiṭavanta peṟkaṭikala
ṟai varaintorutāṉañcātti Aṟaikaḻal
viśvalokattu viḷaṅku maṉuneṟinin[ ṟaśva] metañceytaraicu viṟṟirunta jaya
ṅko ṉuyarnta perumpukaḻ kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīvi
3 10 5 Āvatu rājen=tiraciṅkavaḷanāṭṭup
po �ntakaccaruppetimaṅkalattu māhāsabhai- yom
Iva veḷḷikkiḻamai peṟṟa coti śrīma

namaka mukaśvavara ṭṭariloruvalil veṇṇuṭaiyuṭutti Oruvaṉai
Añcu cikai caittu Āhomalliyu
kuminaṟu p[ovettu na ] kunta peṟkaṭaitanaṉu
ṭan porukiṭaṟkoṭuviṭṭi nilavi cenṟāṅ koṭṭinār
Digital edition of SII 26.767 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
